name: capture
description: Add to a patient's chart from the chart app drawer or the Provider Companion: capture/upload a multi-page document, attach an exam photo to one of your open notes, or update the patient's profile picture.

applications.name: Capture
applications.description: Add a document, exam photo, or profile picture to the patient's chart

applications.name: Capture
applications.description: Add a document, exam photo, or profile picture to the patient's chart

protocols.description: SimpleAPI endpoint that builds a PDF from captured/uploaded pages and creates a DocumentReference via the Canvas FHIR API
